notes: Independent xhigh review-and-fix completed; key math fix = conditional range of f(k) is at most (not equal to) the live-neighbor count N_k, plus empty/zero-row guards and K_{d,d} d|n precision. Re-verified by brute force: N_k uniform on {1..r_k} over all reveal orders for every fixed matching, E[log N_k]=(1/r_k)log(r_k!) exactly, and per(A)<=prod(r_i!)^(1/r_i) on 40 random + K_{d,d} cases (equality on K_{d,d}). Context headers '# Context'/'## Problem' intact; reasoning.md header-free; no leaks. Codex's transient inner-companion usage-limit note was an unnecessary nested call, not a failure of the actual task.
